condition.acceptance_rule: strict parser requires one accepted open_item and one accepted schedule_request
condition.request_shape: POST /v1/messages with forced loose submit_action_object tool input; response object comes from tool_use.input.

open_items.description: Verify that the minimal viable scope for the first tiny live autonomy pilot is fully documented, including: (1) defined inputs and expected outputs, (2) explicit success and failure criteria, (3) stakeholder sign-off. This must be resolved before live execution proceeds.
open_items.title: Confirm pilot scope documentation and agreement

input.response: Wake seeded for the first tiny live autonomy pilot. One bounded follow-up item has been identified and preserved as an open item: confirm that the pilot's minimal viable scope (inputs, outputs, and success criteria) is fully documented and agreed upon before any live execution begins. A single wake has been scheduled to resolve this item using the designated recall context.

schedule_requests.purpose: Resolve open item pilot-scope-confirmation-001: review and confirm that the first tiny live autonomy pilot scope documentation is complete and agreed upon, then determine readiness to proceed to live execution.
